title: Boao 12 Pieces Pine Snowy Flower Picks Artificial Holly Red Berry Pine Cone Picks Fake Berries Pine Cones for Christmas Crafts Party Festive Home Decor 11 Inch Flexible Stems
features: Package includes: 12 packs of pine snowy flower picks, good workmanship, each pick measures approx. 11 inches tall overall; Stems attached to Christmas flowers are strong but bendable for most your crafting needs

Feature: these craft picks have snow dusted leaves, red holly berries and a pine cone flocked with snow, each one is attached firmly to a flexible craft stick, great for gift embellishments or holiday craft projects
Christmas decoration: these pine picks are suitable for Christmas floral arrangements, DIY wreath design, indoor lanterns or baskets, add them to your Xmas tree for a rustic farmhouse look

Christmas gift: use these red berry picks to make collectible keepsake for your mom, grandma, sister, co-worker or friend, add as a gift for topper for a cute accessory, wonderful for Christmas holiday DIY ornaments

Decorating party: faux flowers are excellent for Christmas weddings, parties, company events and other holiday functions, good addition to mantels, entry ways, banisters, tables, windows and entertainment centers
description: 12 Pieces pine snowy flower picks artificial holly red berry pine cone picks fake berries pine cones for Christmas crafts party festive home decor 11 inch flexible stems Pine floral picks: These craft picks have snow dusted leaves, red holly berries and a pine cone flocked with snow, each Christmas picks craft is attached firmly to a flexible craft stick, adorable for gift embellishments or holiday craft projects. Function: The pine cone picks are suitable for Christmas floral arrangements, DIY wreath design, indoor lanterns or baskets, add them to your Xmas tree for a rustic farmhouse look. Use these fake berries pine cones to make collectible keepsake for your mom, grandma, sister, co-worker or friend, add as a gift for topper for a cute embellishment for Christmas holiday DIY ornaments. Artificial flowers are suitable for Christmas weddings, parties, company events and other holiday functions, great addition to mantels, entry ways, banisters, tables, windows and entertainment centers. Specification Quantity: 12 pieces Size: 11 inch tall Package includes: 12 x Pine snowy flower picks
